sentences.translation: Porodica je stigla u hotel noću.
sentences.translationEn: The family arrived at the hotel at night.

sentences.translation: Sobe su bile spremne i svjetlo prigušeno.
sentences.translationEn: The rooms were ready and the light was dim.

sentences.arabic: نَامَ الْأَطْفَالُ بِسُرْعَةٍ بَعْدَ رِحْلَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su brzo zaspala nakon dugog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The children fell asleep quickly after a long trip.

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَ الْأَبُ مُسْتَيْقِظًا قَلِيلًا وَقَرَأَ كِتَابًا.
sentences.translation: Otac je ostao budan malo i čitao knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: The father stayed awake a little and read a book.
